issue.description: The Agents-tab metadata panel supports beautiful, reliable, vim-faithful incremental text search (`/`, `?`, `n`, `N`, `<esc>`/`q`) across every panel variant (single agent, clan, family, tribe, workflow, step), with easy free-form text copying from a jumped-to match. The previous `/` (edit query) and `?` (help) bindings move to `,/` and `,?` on all tabs.
issue.title: Vim-style text search for the Agents-tab metadata panel

issue.description: 'Shared vim-search engine extracted from the zoom modal' section: factor the ZoomSearchMixin state machine (typing/committed modes, incremental preview, n/N wrap, command-line rendering, scroll-to-match math) into a host-agnostic controller and re-host the zoom modal on it with zero behavior change.
issue.title: Shared vim-search engine extracted from the zoom modal

issue.description: 'Remap edit-query and help to leader chords' section: retire the app-level `slash`/`question_mark` bindings for edit_query and show_help, re-home both as leader-mode keys on all tabs, and update every hint surface (help modal, footer, onboarding, command palette, quickstart) that displays those keys.
issue.title: Remap edit-query and help to leader chords `,/` and `,?`

issue.description: 'Inline search-mode on the agent metadata panel' section: bind `/` and `?` on the Agents tab to a new search-mode hosted on the AgentDetail prompt panel using the shared engine, covering all panel variants, with yank/selection support, help and footer documentation, and unit plus PNG visual snapshot coverage.
issue.title: Inline search-mode on the agent metadata panel

fields.notes: Implemented the remap of edit-query/help from app-level / and ? to leader chords ,/ and ,? across all top-level tabs. Added reserved metadata search bindings with no-op-safe gating, stale override compatibility, command palette/availability updates, shared leader chord formatting, and refreshed all help/footer/onboarding/quickstart/artifact hint surfaces plus PNG goldens. Verification: SASE_PYTEST_WORKERS=8 just check passed (19,040 tests); dedicated visual suite passed (270 passed, 1 skipped).

Extracted the zoom modal's Vim search state machine into a host-agnostic VimSearchController, moved renderable flattening into a shared widget helper, re-hosted ZoomSearchMixin as a thin adapter with compatibility state views, and added focused controller tests. Verification: focused controller + unchanged zoom-search suite (15 passed); ruff, mypy, and Symvision passed; SASE_PYTEST_WORKERS=1 just check passed completely. Two 16-worker checks exposed unrelated shifting shared-state flakes whose failed tests all passed in isolation.
